audit_items.proof_trace: ERC20 `transferFrom` is bounded by `min(allowance, balance)` — even if vault relayer approval remains at the original full-balance level after a partial `bid()`, the relayer cannot pull more tokens than the auction contract actually holds. `isValidSignature` further guards against validating new CoW orders whose `sellAmount` exceeds `assetInBalance`. Approval is fully revoked via `forceApprove(vault_relayer, 0)` at `_onAuctionEnd`, so no lingering excess remains post-auction.
